name: Chocolate Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the egg whites and salt until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add in the sugar while continuing to beat on high speed until the mixture is thick and glossy.
3. Mix in the cocoa powder and cornstarch until well combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract and melted butter until smooth.
5. Gently fold the egg yolks into the meringue mixture using a spatula.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell and spread evenly with a spatula.
7. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for approximately 1 hour, or until set and lightly browned on top.
8. Allow to cool completely before refrigerating.
